translations.command.bounty.name: bounty
translations.form.bounty.title: Bounty Hunting
translations.form.bounty.main_content:
&aPut a bounty on a player's head, let the hunters chase them!
&7Active bounties: &f%count%
translations.form.bounty.info_content:
&2&l»&r &aBounty Hunting&f is a system where you put a cash reward on a player's head.

&d&l»&r &f- You place a bounty on a target and set the reward amount.
&d&l»&r &f- The amount you set is instantly deducted from your account.
&d&l»&r &f- Multiple players can add to the same target, growing the reward pool.
&d&l»&r &f- The hunter who kills that player wins the entire pool.
&d&l»&r &f- The bounty closes once the reward is claimed.

&c&l»&r &cYou can't put a bounty on yourself!
translations.form.bounty.list_content: &7Click a bounty to see its details.
translations.form.bounty.list_empty: &7There are no active bounties right now.
translations.message.bounty.no_targets: &cThere are no online players to place a bounty on.
translations.message.bounty.self: &cYou cannot place a bounty on yourself.
translations.command.slapper.name: slapper
translations.message.slapper.help:
&6=== Slapper Commands ===
&e/slapper create <type> <name> &7- Create an NPC
&e/slapper edit <id> <scale|addcmd|delcmd|name> &7- Edit an NPC
&e/slapper remove [id] &7- Remove an NPC
&e/slapper list &7- List NPCs
&e/slapper info <id> &7- NPC info
&e/slapper tpme <id> &7- Move NPC to you
&e/slapper killall &7- Despawn all NPCs
&e/slapper spawnall &7- Respawn all NPCs
translations.message.slapper.removal_mode: &eRemoval mode active. Hit the slapper you want to remove. Cancel with /slapper cancel.

&7- Only you and the &fpartners &7you add can build inside your claim.
&7- You can grant or revoke &fplace, break and interact &7permissions per partner.
&7- You can give each claim a &fname &7and teleport to it anytime.

§p§l»§r§dThe market is only open between §b{hours}§d.
§p§l»§r§d{count} deals exclusive to tonight await you.
§4§l»§r§cTonight you can buy only §lone§r§c item!
translations.form.auction.info_content:
The auction system lets you put up an item for bidding at a starting price you set. Other players can bid on your item, and the highest bidder earns the right to buy it.

Each auction stays active for 24 hours, during which players can keep bidding. When the time runs out, the highest bidder wins and the item is automatically transferred to them.

If no one bids during the auction, the item is safely returned to its owner.

Items won or returned are never lost; they are all added to the auction stash. Players can safely collect their items from this stash whenever they like.

This system is designed to provide a safe and fair trading environment between players.

translations.form.rules.button.accept: I have read and accept the rules. I confirm.
translations.form.rules.content:
&4&lNOTE: &r&6Every player on the server is considered to have read and accepted the rules upon joining, as stated when entering!

&cCheating
&3Using cheats under any circumstances is strictly forbidden.
When a player is confirmed to be cheating with visual proof, they will be banned from the server for 15-30 days without a warning.

&cServer Advertising
&3Advertising other servers is forbidden.
Players who advertise will be banned from the server for 1-15 days without a warning.

&cAccount Trading
&3Selling any in-game item or data for real money, or trading it for another product accessed with real money, is strictly forbidden.
If real-money trading is proven, both parties will be banned from the server for 15-30 days without a warning.
If real-money trading was offered but did not take place, a 5-day ban will be applied.

&cScamming
&3Scamming and fraud are against our rules and strictly forbidden.
Stealing other players' in-game items, or tricking them to take their items or money, is unacceptable.
The penalty for such behavior is a 15-30 day ban.

&cInsults-Swearing-Flood-Spam
&3Swearing at or insulting other players, disturbing them, flooding and spamming in chat is forbidden.
Those who commit these offenses will receive a mute of 1-15 days or permanently.

&cSlander
&3Slandering other players, threatening them, cursing, fighting, and disturbing the general server peace is forbidden.
If this behavior does not contain insults or swearing, the penalty is a mute of 6 hours to 1 day.
If it contains swearing or insults, the swearing mute duration is added on top of this penalty.

&cFalse Identity
&3Pretending to be a staff member or another player in chat, using someone else's name or rank to write messages, is forbidden.

&cReligious & National Values
&3In case of any insult or disrespect to religious or national values, the player will be banned from the server for 15-30 days.

&cExcessive Slang
&3Excessive use of slang, writing overly obscene, +18 messages is strictly forbidden.
&3This rule was added to protect younger players on the server.
The penalty is set as a 1-15 day ban.

&cExploiting In-Game Bugs
&3Exploiting server and game bugs is forbidden.
&3The moment a player finds a bug, they must share it with the administrators.
&3We also want you to know that we reward players who share important bugs with us.
&3Those who exploit bugs will be banned from the server permanently, without a warning.

&cBasic Articles
&3Harassing or disturbing other players is forbidden. Sending messages that provoke players is also forbidden.
&3Sharing other players' account information is strictly forbidden. Those who share passwords, emails or other information a player doesn't want shared will be banned permanently.
&3Spreading false information about the server or staff, or making statements that damage the reputation of the server or staff, is forbidden.
&3Farming stats or money with alt accounts is forbidden. Players who bring alt accounts in-game and kill them to gain profit get a 30-day ban.
&3Farming unfair stats and money by colluding with other players is forbidden.
&3Swearing through methods other than chat (books, commands, etc.) will result in a temporary mute.
&3Stealing accounts, hijacking accounts, accessing other players' accounts and exchanging data without their permission is forbidden. If proven, the offender will be banned permanently.
